series_metadata.series_title: AI Staff Meeting Transcriptions and Summaries
series_metadata.series_description: Staff meetings that are held online through video conferencing software and an AI powered note taking tool is utilized during the meeting. After the meeting, the AI tool provides a detailed transcript of what was discussed during the meeting and/or provides a detailed summary of the transcript.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: AI summary of meeting six months date of meeting, unless meeting topic is subject ongoing litigation, audit, or regulatory hold. ; Electronic: AI transcription of meeting one month date of meeting, unless meeting topic is subject ongoing litigation, audit, or regulatory hold
